return(function(z,I,S,F,T,R,V,e,i,K,g,n,G,L,u,Z,q,O,h,Y,o,M)u,Y,o,n,K,q,g,G,i,e,M,Z,h,L,O=function(z,A)local I=g(A)local S=function(S,F,T)return K(z,{S,F,T},A,I)end return S
